---
title: Directive option gate extension test
author: Dongyu Zhao
version: 0.1
date: '2026-06-22'
license: '[CC-BY-SA 4.0](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)'
...

## Directive option gates

These examples attach the directive extension without enabling its
parser option. The extension syntax remains ordinary Markdown.

```````````````````````````````` example
Use :cite[smith04] here.
.
Document scope=1:1..1:24 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:24 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:24 literal="Use :cite[smith04] here." children=0
````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````` example
::youtube[Video]{vid=01ab2cd3efg}
.
Document scope=1:1..1:33 children=1
└── Paragraph scope=1:1..1:33 children=1
    └── Text scope=1:1..1:33 literal="::youtube[Video]{vid=01ab2cd3efg}" children=0
````````````````````````````````
